summary: P1 improvements tested successfully: 1) Responsive design for AsistenteIA tabs (5→3→2→1 columns), AI chat grid, Dashboard stats grid, Parcelas form. 2) Pagination component on Parcelas page with page size selector (25/50/100). 3) Dashboard Productividad widget with 6 KPI cards. 4) NaN% margin bug fixed. 5) All 10 backend regression tests passed (6 export endpoints, AI chat, NFC fichaje, Dashboard KPIs, Parcelas pagination).
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 responsive improvements verified. CSS classes ai-tabs-grid, ai-kpi-grid, ai-chat-grid, form-grid-responsive all working with proper media queries. Pagination component on Parcelas page working with skip/limit params. Dashboard Productividad widget shows 6 KPIs (Rendimiento, Coste/ha, Ingresos/ha, Margen Neto/ha, Superficie Media, Precio Medio/kg). NaN% bug fixed with zero-division check.

responsive_design: AsistenteIA tabs: 5 cols (desktop) → 3 cols (1200px) → 2 cols (767px) → 1 col (480px) - WORKING
Dashboard stats grid: 6 cols (desktop) → 1 col (mobile) - WORKING
Parcelas page buttons: flex-wrap on mobile - WORKING
pagination: Pagination component below Parcelas table - WORKING
Page size selector with 25/50/100 options - WORKING
dashboard_productividad: Widget with 'Análisis de Productividad' title - WORKING
6 metric cards: Rendimiento, Coste/ha, Ingresos/ha, Margen Neto/ha, Superficie Media, Precio Medio/kg - WORKING
nan_bug_fix: Dashboard margin percentage shows 0.0% instead of NaN% when total_ingresos is 0 - WORKING
